criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance the shopping experience, such as personalized recommendations, visual search, or chatbots.
criteria.sources: Company announcements, tech blogs, app reviews

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, usability studies

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app, including payment options, product variety, and additional tools.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, feature lists, user feedback

criteria.name: Market Presence
criteria.description: The app's popularity and reach in the market, indicated by download numbers, active users, and brand recognition.
criteria.sources: Market research reports, app store statistics, company press releases

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The app's introduction of new and unique features or technologies that set it apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: Industry analyses, tech news, company announcements
